name: Mempool
description: Self-hosted blockchain explorer and mempool visualizer.
compose:
name: "slashnode-mempool"
services:
  mempool-db:
    image: "mariadb:10.5"
    container_name: "mempool-db"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - "mempool-db:/var/lib/mysql"
    environment:
      MYSQL_DATABASE: "mempool"
      MYSQL_USER: "mempool"
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: "${secret.DB_PASSWORD}"
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: "${secret.DB_PASSWORD}"
  mempool-api:
    image: "mempool/backend:v3.0.0"
    container_name: "mempool-api"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - "mempool-api:/backend/cache"
    environment:
      MEMPOOL_BACKEND: "electrum"
      ELECTRUM_HOST: "${electrs.exports.electrum.host}"
      ELECTRUM_PORT: "${electrs.exports.electrum.port}"
      ELECTRUM_TLS_ENABLED: "false"
      CORE_RPC_HOST: "${bitcoind.exports.rpc.host}"
      CORE_RPC_PORT: "8332"
      CORE_RPC_USERNAME: "${bitcoind.exports.rpc.user}"
      CORE_RPC_PASSWORD: "${bitcoind.exports.rpc.password}"
      DATABASE_ENABLED: "true"
      DATABASE_HOST: "mempool-db"
      DATABASE_DATABASE: "mempool"
      DATABASE_USERNAME: "mempool"
      DATABASE_PASSWORD: "${secret.DB_PASSWORD}"
  mempool-web:
    image: "mempool/frontend:v3.0.0"
    container_name: "mempool-web"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - "8999:8080"
    environment:
      FRONTEND_HTTP_PORT: "8080"
      BACKEND_MAINNET_HTTP_HOST: "mempool-api"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  mempool-db:
    name: "slashnode-mempool_mempool_mempool-db"
  mempool-api:
    name: "slashnode-mempool_mempool_mempool-api"
